task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Job Site - Riverfront' internal location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo Locations list or form view showing a location named 'Job Site - Riverfront' with its Location Type set to 'Internal Location'.

task_completion.description: Verify the internal transfer of available stock from the main warehouse to the job site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a validated Internal Transfer operation in Odoo from 'WH/Stock' to 'Job Site - Riverfront' containing Heavy Duty Steel Beams (20), Portland Cement (80), and Commercial Copper Wiring (5).

task_completion.description: Verify that the item with a safety hold was excluded from all transfers and purchases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the internal transfers and purchase orders. The 'Hazardous Material Containment Drum' must NOT be present in any validated transfer to the job site or any purchase order.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Purchase Order for the unfulfilled quantities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Purchase Order in Odoo addressed to 'BuildMart Wholesale' containing Heavy Duty Steel Beams (30), Portland Cement (120), and Acoustic Ceiling Tiles (100).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Purchase Order materials are received directly at the job site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Receipt/Delivery associated with the Purchase Order. The 'Destination Location' must be set to 'Job Site - Riverfront' (not WH/Stock) and the status should be 'Done' or 'Validated'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser interface with Odoo menus, buttons, and forms, rather than terminal windows executing Python or XMLRPC scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like the Inventory dashboard, Purchase module, or product search screens, not just a final success message or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from genuine software interaction and not HTML tampering.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface should look standard without browser developer tools open or visually inconsistent text rendering that suggests DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: 'Job Site - Riverfront'. Vendor: 'BuildMart Wholesale'. The 'Hazardous Material Containment Drum' has a safety hold and must NOT be transferred or purchased (Quantity 0). The expected Internal Transfer from WH/Stock to the Job Site should contain exactly: Heavy Duty Steel Beams (20), Portland Cement (80), and Commercial Copper Wiring (5). The expected Purchase Order to BuildMart Wholesale should contain exactly: Heavy Duty Steel Beams (30), Portland Cement (120), and Acoustic Ceiling Tiles (100). The PO receipt must be delivered directly to 'Job Site - Riverfront'.
